response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong technical leadership, mentoring ability, and infrastructure experience across multiple domains, he falls significantly short on the core technical requirement of 8+ years of C++ programming (only ~6 months documented experience) and lacks focused cloud platform architecture expertise. The role requires deep C++ and cloud infrastructure specialization that this candidate's polyglot, full-stack background has not developed.
strengths: Proven technical leadership and mentoring across multiple companies; organized refactoring dojos and established TDD practices
Hands-on infrastructure and DevOps experience with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and distributed systems handling millions of requests/sec
Senior-level architect capable of owning large, ambiguous projects from conception through production deployment
concerns: Critically missing 8 years C++ requirement—only ~6 months documented C++ experience at National Instruments and thesis work
Background is full-stack web/backend engineering, not cloud platform infrastructure; no production cloud compute platform portfolio
Recent career trajectory (April 2025-present) moving toward AI agents and tooling, away from infrastructure and systems-level work
